calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Sep-30-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

Granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and a separate proposed judgment.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)

Notice Of And Motion For Order Setting Aside Dismissal Of The Case
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion For Order Setting Aside Dismissal Of The Case.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.'s motion for order setting aside dismissal of the case is granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to CRC 3.1385. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq. (415-680-5731) specially appearing for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling and rules as follows: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION OF PARTIES is off calendar per request of moving party. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported =(302/hk)

The Order to Show Cause is set to a CRC 3.1385 Order to Show Cause Calendar to APR-12-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE; Clerk RWoods/MOlopernes.
